nodes.label:
Mechanical Ciphers
(Complexity through Machinery)
e.g., Enigma

Modern Symmetric
(Computational Algorithms)
e.g., DES, AES

Modern Asymmetric
(Public-Key Revolution)
e.g., RSA, Diffie-Hellman

visuals.title: History Of Cryptography
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">History of Cryptography: From Caesar to Modern</text>
  
  <!-- Caesar Cipher -->
  <rect x="30" y="60" width="100" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="80" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Caesar Cipher
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Vigenère Cipher -->
  <rect x="160" y="60" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Vigenère Cipher
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Enigma Machine -->
  <rect x="290" y="60" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="340" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Enigma Machine
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- DES -->
  <rect x="30" y="150" width="100" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="80" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    DES (1977)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- RSA -->
  <rect x="160" y="150" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    RSA (1978)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- AES -->
  <rect x="290" y="150" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="340" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    AES (2001)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Quantum Cryptography -->
  <rect x="160" y="240" width="100" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="265" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Quantum Crypto
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Timeline Arrow -->
  <line x1="30" y1="300" x2="390" y2="300" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <polygon points="390,300 380,295 380,305" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>
  <text x="30" y="320" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    100 BC
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="390" y="320" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Present
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
